query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gs1_local_code_lists (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  validationRuleId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  codeListName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  codeValue VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  codeDescription TEXT,
  codeListSegment VARCHAR(255),
  addedInVersion VARCHAR(20),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX lcl_rule_id_idx (validationRuleId),
  INDEX lcl_code_list_idx (codeListName),
  INDEX lcl_active_idx (isActive)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  codeListName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,

  codeDescription TEXT,
  codeListSegment VARCHAR(255),
  addedInVersion VARCHAR(20),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX lcl_rule_id_idx (validationRuleId),
  INDEX lcl_code_list_idx (codeListName),
